channel.title: World
channel.description: The Washington Post World section provides information and analysis of breaking world news stories. In addition to our world news and video, Post World News offers discussions and blogs on major international news and economic issues.

item.title: U.S. strikes Iran after 2 service members killed, 1 missing in attack on Jordan base
item.dc:creator: Maegan Vazquez, Dan Lamothe, Rachel Chason, Mohamad El Chamaa, Suzan Haidamous
item.description: The attacks mark the eighth consecutive day that U.S. forces have bombed Iran. The latest fatalities pushed the American military death toll from the conflict to 16.

item.title: Wildfire smoke will linger and spread this weekend. See which cities are most affected.
item.dc:creator: Ben Noll, Annie Gowen, Tim Craig, Stella Canino-Quiñones, Cat Zakrzewski
item.description: The smoke pouring into the U.S. made Detroit, Chicago and D.C. among the world's most polluted major cities as of early Friday.

item.title: Trump wants to impose tariffs on Canada in retaliation for wildfire smoke
item.dc:creator: Cat Zakrzewski
item.description: The White House did not respond to questions about what legal mechanism he would use to impose the tariffs or how the administration would calculate the rate of the levies.

item.title: U.S. hits bridges and energy targets, Iran says, as strikes widen
item.dc:creator: Rachel Chason, Mohamad El Chamaa, Suzan Haidamous
item.description: The attacks on Iran’s infrastructure came on the sixth consecutive day of U.S. strikes. A retaliatory attack by Iran caused damage to a power and desalination plant in Kuwait.

item.title: How to protect yourself from wildfire smoke
item.dc:creator: Victoria Craw
item.description: Around 100 million people could experience unhealthy air this week. These simple tips will help protect your health.

item.title: After years of drone warfare, Ukraine is selling its ‘blood experience’ to allies
item.dc:creator: David Stern
item.description: As unmanned aerial vehicles target Israel, Persian Gulf states and U.S. forces in the Middle East, Ukraine is selling equipment, giving advice and establishing joint production lines.
